# Bradley Griffin - bradleygriffin.us

Bradley (Brad) Griffin is a Chief Marketing Officer and growth marketing executive with 20+ years of experience, two founded-and-sold companies, and a role in AcreValue's acquisition by CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP). He is a U.S. Army 75th Ranger Regiment veteran.

## Ways to work with him
- /executive - full-time CMO/CEO/growth-executive leadership for boards and investors
- /fractional - fractional CMO for founder-led and mid-market companies
- /consulting - marketing strategy and AI consulting (AI operations, automation, AIO/SEO, MarTech, attribution)
- /speaking - keynotes on market strategy, competition, and AI (Land Investment Expo; statewide PBS debate)

## Evidence
- /case-studies - six documented engagements with company names and numbers
- /story - first-person narrative: 75th Ranger Regiment to the boardroom
- /credentials - Auburn MBA + MSIS, CMU summa cum laude, 8 certifications / 40 courses
- /contact - inquiries: hello@bradleygriffin.us
